data.title: Snowflake Achieves DOD IL5 Authorization: What You Need To Know
data.description: Snowflake Inc (NYSE:SNOW) shares are trading lower, pulling back from a broad market surge on Wednesday that lifted stocks across the board. The company on Thursday announced that it received Department of Defense (DOD) Impact Level 5 (IL5) authorization.

data.title: Inflation Cools, But 'Too Soon To Blow The All Clear,' Economist Says
data.description: Multiple economists emphasized that March's cooling may be temporary, as President Donald Trump's reinforced tariffs and trade measures could reverse progress by raising consumer prices.

data.title: China's Growth Outlook Dims As Trump's 125% Tariffs Put Millions Of Jobs At Risk, Goldman Warns
data.description: Trump's tariff hike on China will hammer GDP and jeopardize millions of jobs, Goldman Sachs warns.

data.title: General Electric And Caterpillar Lead XLI Pullback: What's Going On?
data.description: The Industrial Select Sector SPDR Fund declined 2.2% Thursday morning. Investors moved to lock in profits despite a surprisingly soft inflation report that reinforced Wednesday's bullish macro shift.

data.title: Bitcoin Falls To $78K As Market Jitters; Trump Halts Tariffs After Bond Yield Spike; US-China Tensions Spark Visa Cancellations, Strain Academic Ties - Top Headlines While the US Slept
